Measuring 25mm wide by 950mm long, it is equipped with a swivel hook for flexible, tangle-free attachment—ideal for securing ID cards, badges, or keys during events, offices, or promotions.


Key Features:

  • Material: Soft satin fabric with single-sided full-colour print

  • Size: 25mm wide x 950mm long

  • Print: Crisp single-sided branding for sharp visibility

  • Hardware: Swivel hook for smooth, twist-free fastening

  • MOQ: 75 units

  • Base With Magnetic Closure Flip Lid
  • Full Colour Branding Outside
  • Inner Box White Lined
  • Cosmetic Mounted Hard Case Box Base 1800 Micron

name: Maidstone Golf Umbrellas
description:
Maidstone Golf Umbrella with 136cm diameter and 8-panel canopy provides extra-large coverage for protection on the golf course or outdoors. Made from durable 210T pongee with a manual open black-coated metal frame with fibreglass ribs and black rubberised handle, it’s sturdy, reliable, and comfortable to use.


Key Features

  • 136cm diameter, 8-panel canopy for maximum coverage

  • Durable 210T pongee fabric

  • Manual Open Windproof Black Coated Metal Frame With Fibreglass Ribs

  • Black rubberised handle for comfort

  • Ideal for golfing and outdoor activities

name: Premium Marathon Combo Kit
description:
Equip your event with this all-in-one marathon branding kit, designed for maximum visibility and impact. Includes a 3 x 3m World's Toughest Gazebo with vibrant dye-sublimation print for a durable, eye-catching shelter. The 3.8 x 2.7m Arch Feather Banner adds dynamic outdoor branding, while 20 fence wraps (2 x 1.2m) provide extensive perimeter coverage. Complete with 10 single-sided 3m ProMax Telescopic Banners for versatile and portable brand messaging. Ideal for marathons, outdoor events, and large-scale activations.


Key Features:
 • 1 x 3 x 3m World's Toughest Gazebo with dye-sublimation print
• 1 x Arch Feather Banner – 3.8 x 2.7m
• 20 x Fence Wraps – 2 x 1.2m
• 10 x ProMax Telescopic Banners – 3m, single-sided

name: Value Marathon Combo Kit
description:
Boost your event visibility with the Value Marathon Combo Kit, designed to deliver impactful branding across large outdoor spaces. This kit features a durable 3 x 3m Hexagon Steel Gazebo with vibrant dye-sublimation print, perfect for shelter and eye-catching brand presence. Complemented by a 3.8m x 2.7m Arch Feather Banner for dynamic vertical signage, plus 10 large 2m x 1.2m fence wraps to cover barriers with branded graphics. To complete the package, 10 single-sided 3m ValueFlex Telescopic Banners provide flexible, portable branding for crowd engagement. Ideal for marathons, outdoor events, trade shows, and activations.


Key Features:
 • Hexagon Steel Gazebo – 3 x 3m with full dye-sublimation print for lasting outdoor branding
• Arch Feather Banner – 3.8m x 2.7m for bold vertical impact (weights not included)
• 10 Fence Wraps – 2m x 1.2m for large-scale perimeter branding
• 10 ValueFlex Telescopic Banners – 3m, single-sided for versatile event branding

name: Mnandi Beach Umbrella
description:
Mnandi Beach Umbrella with 176cm diameter and 200cm arch provides generous shade and excellent UV protection for beach or outdoor use. Made from 140G polyester with silver UV lining and white coated steel pole and ribs (22/25mm pole size) with 110cm length, it’s sturdy, durable, and easy to set up.


Key Features

  • 176cm diameter, 200cm arch canopy for maximum shade

  • 140G polyester with silver UV lining for superior sun protection

  • White coated steel pole and ribs (22/25mm)

  • 110cm length for convenient portability

  • Ideal for beach, picnic, and outdoor activities

name: Mojave Mini Compact Umbrella
description:
Mojave Mini Compact Umbrella with 94cm diameter and 8-panel design for reliable coverage in wet weather. Made from durable 180T polyester with a manual open metal frame and black plastic handle, it’s lightweight and easy to carry for everyday use.


Key Features

  • 94cm diameter, 8-panel design

  • Durable 180T polyester canopy

  • Manual open metal frame

  • Black plastic handle

  • Compact and lightweight for daily carry

Monte Mini Compact Umbrella with 98cm diameter and 8-panel canopy provides reliable protection in wet weather. Made from durable 190T pongee with a manual open aluminium frame and black rubberised handle, it’s a sturdy and comfortable choice for daily use.


Key Features

  • 98cm diameter, 8-panel canopy

  • Durable 190T pongee fabric

  • Manual open aluminium frame

  • Black rubberised handle for comfort

  • Compact, lightweight, and practical

Stay connected, track your health, and elevate your fitness with the Volkano Life Series Smart Watch. Designed for everyday use and active lifestyles, this smartwatch combines health monitoring, multisport tracking, and seamless Bluetooth connectivity, allowing you to make and receive calls directly from your wrist. Its high-resolution screen and full-screen touch control, paired with a comfortable hypoallergenic silicone strap, make it both stylish and practical.


Key Features:
• High-resolution screen with rotary dial and full-screen touch control
• Water- and dust-resistant for everyday durability
• Make and receive calls via Bluetooth on your paired phone
• Heart rate, blood oxygen, and blood pressure monitoring for complete health tracking
• 100+ multisport tracking modes for diverse fitness activities
• Multiple customizable watch faces
• Pedometer and calorie usage tracking to monitor daily activity
• Missed call and message notifications
• Compatible with Apple and Android smartphones via Volkano® Fit App
• Comfortable hypoallergenic silicone strap for all-day wear

Key Features:

• Bluetooth wireless calling for hands-free communication

• 100+ multi-sport monitoring modes for versatile fitness tracking

• IP68 water-resistant for durability in all conditions

• Stylish, comfortable design suitable for daily use and workouts
